docs.text: Home Hi! I'm Rick (Ruiqi) Ding ( CV ), welcome to my homepage! Email , GitHub , LinkedIn , Twitter A Brief History of Rick 1997.11.08 : Born in Xianyang city 1997-2004 : Awaiting archaeology 2004-2010 : Studied at Xianyang Experimental Primary School 2010-2013 : Studied at Shaanxi University of Science & Technology Affiliated Middle School 2013-2015 : Studied at Xi'an Gaoxin No.1 High School (ranked 8th nationwide) 2015-2016 : Awarded China-Singapore SM2 Scholarship 2016-2020 : Studied Physics at National University of Singapore 2019 : Studied Biophysics at University of Göttingen 2020-2021 : Worked at Centre for Quantum Technologies

docs.text: Functional ultrasound neuroimaging Caltech : Single-trial decoding of movement intentions using functional ultrasound neuroimaging hardwares Verasonics Vantage 128 Research Ultrasound System Vermon DOMINO linear array probe introduction Introduced by (Mace, 2011) used to image neural activity during epileptic seizures (Mace, 2011) olfactory 嗅觉 stimuli (Osmanski, 2014) behavioral tasks in freely moving rodents with miniature, head-mountable transducers (Sieu, 2015; Urban, 2015) ferrets (Bimbard, 2018) pigeons (Rau, 2018) non-human primates (Blaize, 2020; Dizeux, 2019) humans (Demene, 2017; Imbault, 2017; Soloukey, 2020) 5 to 10 fold better in terms of spatiotemporal resolution and sensitivity compared to fMRI (Deffieux, 2018; Mace, 2011; Rabut, 2020) posterior parietal cortex (PPC) PPC is an association cortical region situated between visual and motor cortical areas involved in spatial attention (Colby and Goldberg, 1999) multisensory integration (Andersen and Buneo, 2002) sensorimotor transformations for movement planning (Andersen and Cui, 2009) subregions lateral intraparietal area (LIP): planning saccade movements (Andersen et al., 1987; Andersen and Buneo, 2002; Gnadt and Andersen, 1988; Snyder et al., 1997) parietal reach region (PRR): planning reach movements (Andersen and Buneo, 2002; Calton et al., 2002; Snyder et al., 2000, 1997). - Importantly, their activity can be simultaneously recorded within a single fUS imaging frame (12.8 x 13 x 0.4 mm) results miniaturized 15-MHz, linear array transducer placed on the dura via a cranial window spatial resolution: 100 x 100 um in-plane, slice thicknesses of 400 um, covering a plane with a width of 12.8 mm and penetration depth of 16 mm We used a plane-wave imaging sequence at a pulse repetition frequency of 7,500 Hz and compounded frames collected from a 500-ms period each second to form power Doppler images with a 1 Hz refresh rate
docs.title: Functional ultrasound neuroimaging
Caltech: Single-trial decoding of movement intentions using functional ultrasound neuroimaging

docs.text: Verasonics Vantage 128 Research Ultrasound System Vermon DOMINO linear array probe

docs.text: Introduced by (Mace, 2011) used to image neural activity during epileptic seizures (Mace, 2011) olfactory 嗅觉 stimuli (Osmanski, 2014) behavioral tasks in freely moving rodents with miniature, head-mountable transducers (Sieu, 2015; Urban, 2015) ferrets (Bimbard, 2018) pigeons (Rau, 2018) non-human primates (Blaize, 2020; Dizeux, 2019) humans (Demene, 2017; Imbault, 2017; Soloukey, 2020) 5 to 10 fold better in terms of spatiotemporal resolution and sensitivity compared to fMRI (Deffieux, 2018; Mace, 2011; Rabut, 2020)
docs.title: introduction

docs.text: PPC is an association cortical region situated between visual and motor cortical areas involved in spatial attention (Colby and Goldberg, 1999) multisensory integration (Andersen and Buneo, 2002) sensorimotor transformations for movement planning (Andersen and Cui, 2009) subregions lateral intraparietal area (LIP): planning saccade movements (Andersen et al., 1987; Andersen and Buneo, 2002; Gnadt and Andersen, 1988; Snyder et al., 1997) parietal reach region (PRR): planning reach movements (Andersen and Buneo, 2002; Calton et al., 2002; Snyder et al., 2000, 1997). - Importantly, their activity can be simultaneously recorded within a single fUS imaging frame (12.8 x 13 x 0.4 mm)
docs.title: posterior parietal cortex (PPC)

docs.text: miniaturized 15-MHz, linear array transducer placed on the dura via a cranial window spatial resolution: 100 x 100 um in-plane, slice thicknesses of 400 um, covering a plane with a width of 12.8 mm and penetration depth of 16 mm We used a plane-wave imaging sequence at a pulse repetition frequency of 7,500 Hz and compounded frames collected from a 500-ms period each second to form power Doppler images with a 1 Hz refresh rate
docs.title: results

\mu(p) | MD ( p ) = N 1 ​ ∑ ∣ p i ​ − μ ( p ) ∣ 网红指标 [EMA] Exponential Moving Average 指数移动平均线 μ E n = r p n + ( 1 − r ) μ E n − 1 {\mu_E}_n = r p_n + (1-r) {\mu_E}_{n-1} μ E ​ n ​ = r p n ​ + ( 1 − r ) μ E ​ n − 1 ​ [MACD] Moving Average Convergence / Divergence 指数平滑移动平均线 m = μ E , r 1 − μ E , r 2 m = \mu_{E, r_1} - \mu_{E, r_2} m = μ E , r 1 ​ ​ − μ E , r 2 ​ ​ [KDJ] Stochastic Oscillator 随机指标 K = p C − min ⁡ ( p L ) max ⁡ ( p H ) − min ⁡ ( p L ) ⋅ 100 K = { p_C - \min(p_L) \over \max(p_H) - \min(p_L) } \cdot 100 K = m a x ( p H ​ ) − m i n ( p L ​ ) p C ​ − m i n ( p L ​ ) ​ ⋅ 100 D = μ ( K ) D = \mu(K) D = μ ( K ) J = r K + ( 1 − r ) D J = r K + (1-r) D J = rK + ( 1 − r ) D [BOLL] Bollinger Bands 布林带 p ˉ = p H + p L + p C 3 \bar{p} = { p_H + p_L + p_C \over 3 } p ˉ ​ = 3 p H ​ + p L ​ + p C ​ ​ , 称作 Typical price 典型价格 b M = μ ( p ˉ ) b_M = \mu( \bar{p} ) b M ​ = μ ( p ˉ ​ ) b U / L = b M ± N σ ( p ˉ ) b_{U/L} = b_M \pm N \sigma( \bar{p} ) b U / L ​ = b M ​ ± N σ ( p ˉ ​ ) [RSI] Relative Strength Index 相对强度指数 dp = close - close [ - 1 ] up = abs ( dp ) if dp > 0 else 0 down = abs ( dp ) if dp < 0 else 0 upAvg = r * upAvg [ - 1 ] + ( 1 - r ) * up downAvg = r * downAvg [ - 1 ] + ( 1 - r ) * down rsi = upAvg / ( upAvg + downAvg ) * 100 [CCI] Commodity Channel Index 商品通道指数 p ˉ = p H T + p L T + p C 3 \bar{p} = { p_{HT} + p_{LT} + p_C \over 3 } p ˉ ​ = 3 p H T ​ + p L T ​ + p C ​ ​ p H T p_{HT} p H T ​ : T T T 时间内最高价 c = p ˉ − μ S ( p ˉ ) 1.5    MD ( p ˉ ) ⋅ 100 c = { \bar{p} - \mu_S(\bar{p}) \over 1.5 \; \text{MD}(\bar{p}) } \cdot 100 c = 1.5 MD ( p ˉ ​ ) p ˉ ​ − μ S ​ ( p ˉ ​ ) ​ ⋅ 100 Williams' R 威廉姆斯的R max ⁡ ( p H ) − p C max ⁡ ( p H ) − min ⁡ ( p L ) ⋅ 100 { \max(p_H) - p_C \over \max(p_H) - \min(p_L) } \cdot 100 m a x ( p H ​ ) − m i n ( p L ​ ) m a x ( p H ​ ) − p C ​ ​ ⋅ 100 [SAR] Parabolic Stop And Reverse 抛物线反转 如果在涨(收 > 开): E = max ⁡ ( p ) E = \max(p) E = max ( p ) 如果在跌(收 < 开): E = min ⁡ ( p ) E = \min(p) E = min ( p ) s n = s n − 1 + a ( E n − 1 − s n − 1 ) s_n = s_{n-1} + a ( E_{n-1} - s_{n-1} ) s n ​ = s n − 1 ​ + a ( E n − 1 ​ − s n − 1 ​ ) a a a : 加速因子 考察均值的指标 [DEMA] Double Exponential Moving Average 双指数移动平均线 延迟小于 μ E \mu_E μ E ​ , 原理即下式中移除双延迟项 μ D ( p ) = 2 μ E ( p ) − μ E ( μ E ( p ) ) \mu_D(p) = 2 \mu_E(p) - \mu_E(\mu_E(p)) μ D ​ ( p ) = 2 μ E ​ ( p ) − μ E ​ ( μ E ​ ( p )) [TEMA] Triple Exponential Moving Average 三指数移动平均线 μ T ( p ) = 3 μ E ( p ) − 3 μ E ( μ E ( p ) ) + μ E ( μ E ( μ E ( p ) ) ) \mu_T(p) = 3 \mu_E(p) - 3 \mu_E(\mu_E(p)) + \mu_E(\mu_E(\mu_E(p))) μ T ​ ( p ) = 3 μ E ​ ( p ) − 3 μ E ​ ( μ E ​ ( p )) + μ E ​ ( μ E ​ ( μ E ​ ( p ))) Generalized DEMA 广义双指数移动平均线 μ G ( p ) = ( 1 + r ) μ E ( p ) − r μ E ( μ E ( p ) ) \mu_G(p) = (1+r) \mu_E(p) - r \mu_E(\mu_E(p)) μ G ​ ( p ) = ( 1 + r ) μ E ​ ( p ) − r μ E ​ ( μ E ​ ( p )) [T3] 三阶广义双指数移动平均线 T 3 ( p ) = μ G ( μ G ( μ G ( p ) ) ) T3(p) = \mu_G(\mu_G(\mu_G(p))) T 3 ( p ) = μ G ​ ( μ G ​ ( μ G ​ ( p ))) 考察动量的指标 [Aroon] (dawn's early light) 阿隆 (黎明的曙光) A H / L = T − T H / L T ⋅ 100 A_{H/L} = {T - T_{H/L} \over T} \cdot 100 A H / L ​ = T T − T H / L ​ ​ ⋅ 100 T H / L T_{H/L} T H / L ​ : 在 T T T 时间内, 从最高/最低价算起经过的时间 示例: 如果当前最低点是 T T T 内的最低点, 说明价格在下跌, 则 T L = 0 , A L = 100 T_L = 0, A_L = 100 T L ​ = 0 , A L ​ = 100 [CMO] Chande Momentum Oscillator 钱德动量振荡器 c = ∑ Δ p ∑ ∣ Δ p ∣ ⋅ 100 c = { \sum \Delta p \over \sum |\Delta p| } \cdot 100 c = ∑ ∣Δ p ∣ ∑ Δ p ​ ⋅ 100 [DMI] Directional Movement Index 方向运动指数 dH = high [ - 1 ] - high dL = low - low [ - 1 ] if ( dH < 0 and dL < 0 ): plusDM = 0 minusDM = 0 plusDM = dH if dH > dL else 0 minusDM = 0 if dH > dL else dL trueHigh = max ( high [ 0 ], close [ - 1 ] ) trueLow = min ( low [ 0 ] , close [ - 1 ] ) trueRange = trueHigh - trueLow sumPlusDM = sumPlusDM [ - 1 ] * ( 1 - 1 / T ) + plusDM sumMinusDM = sumMinusDM [ - 1 ] * ( 1 - 1 / T ) + minusDM sumTrueRange = sumTrueRange [ - 1 ] * ( 1 - 1 / T ) + trueRange plusDI = sumPlusDM / sumTrueRange * 100 minusDI = sumMinusDM / sumTrueRange * 100 dmi = ( plusDI - minusDI ) / ( plusDI + minusDI ) [MFI] Money Flow Index 资金流量指数 Note 找赫神讨论一下流体力学在量化交易中的应用 moneyFlow = typicalPrice * volume if tp > tp [ - 1 ]: plusMF = plusMF [ - 1 ] + MF else : minusMF = minusMF [ - 1 ] + MF plus = sum ( plusMF ) minus = sum ( minusMF ) mfi = plus / ( plus + minus ) * 100 Momentum 动量 m n = p n − p n − T m_n = p_n - p_{n-T} m n ​ = p n ​ − p n − T ​ My Momentum and Force 我自创的动量和力 物理原理: p = m v , F = d t p p = mv, F = d_t p p = m v , F = d t ​ p 换成交易: m = V d t p , F = d t V d t p + V d t 2 p m = V d_t p, F = d_t V d_t p + V d^2_t p m = V d t ​ p , F = d t ​ V d t ​ p + V d t 2 ​ p [TRIX] Rate-Of-Change of a Triple Smooth EMA 三重平滑EMA的变化率 m = μ E ( μ E ( μ E ( p ) ) ) m = \mu_E(\mu_E(\mu_E(p))) m = μ E ​ ( μ E ​ ( μ E ​ ( p ))) trix = m n − m n − 1 m n ⋅ 100 \text{trix} = { m_n - m_{n-1} \over m_n } \cdot 100 trix = m n ​ m n ​ − m n − 1 ​ ​ ⋅ 100 Ultimate Oscillator 终极摆动指标 a i = T i μ S , T i ( p C − trueLow ) a_i = T_i \mu_{S, T_i}(p_C - \text{trueLow}) a i ​ = T i ​ μ S , T i ​ ​ ( p C ​ − trueLow ) b i = T i μ S , T i ( trueRange ) b_i = T_i \mu_{S, T_i}(\text{trueRange}) b i ​ = T i ​ μ S , T i ​ ​ ( trueRange ) u = ∑ r i a i b i u = \sum r_i {a_i \over b_i} u = ∑ r i ​ b i ​ a i ​ ​

docs.title: Anthony Zador

docs.text: .katex img { display: block; position: absolute; width: 100%; height: inherit; } Encoding innate ability through a genomic bottleneck pdf Introduction C. elegans genome: 1 0 8 10^8 1 0 8 base pairs => 2 × 1 0 8 2 \times 10^8 2 × 1 0 8 bits capacity 302 neurons => 30 2 2 302^2 30 2 2 connection matrix => 9 × 1 0 4 9 \times 10^4 9 × 1 0 4 bits required human genome: 1 0 9 10^9 1 0 9 bits capacity 1 0 10 10^{10} 1 0 10 neurons => 1 0 15 10^{15} 1 0 15 bits required Thus, the genome specifies rules instead Example: "connect to your four nearest neighbors" rules based on the cell surface markers (Sperry, 1963; Zipursky and Sanes, 2010; Wei et al., 2013) Complex structures such as orientation columns in the visual cortex can be induced to self-organize from simple use-dependent rules (Von der Malsburg, 1973) However, above are not applicable to complex networks For ANNs, we seek to compress the weight matrix into a much smaller "genome" Implementation of the Genomic Bottleneck trained network = phenotype 表型 network = p-network use a genomic (g-network) to generate p-network input to g-network: a pair of neurons, output: connection strength inspired by neurodevelopmental rules based on local pair-wise interactions between neurons (Sperry, 1963; Zipursky and Sanes, 2010), not a realistic model of neural development (Stanley et al., 2009; Barabási and Barabási, 2020) use SGD (Ha et al., 2016) rather than evolutionary algorithms (Stanley et al., 2009, 2019) to achieve end-to-end optimization of both g and p represent each neuron in the p-network by a unique binary label Each binary digit in this label is indicator of a molecular tag N neurons => l o g 2 ( N ) log_2(N) l o g 2 ​ ( N ) binary digits Connectivity is effectively guided by interactions of pairs of molecules expressed on the pre- and postsynaptic membranes
docs.title: Encoding innate ability through a genomic bottleneck
